title: stelis cracens
intro: Stelis cracens, a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis cracens has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stelis cracens include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and providing relief from fever and body aches. In herbal preparations, Stelis cracens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
